description_long: This is a muscular adult male figure with a broad chest and defined arms, standing in a neutral pose with arms slightly outstretched. He is wearing minimal athletic attire, consisting of tight shorts, knee-high lace-up boots, and armbands on both biceps and wrists. The figure's skin is smooth and the musculature is well-defined, suggesting an athletic or wrestler archetype. His head is shaved on the sides with a short, close-cropped hairstyle on top. The overall appearance is that of a fit, strong individual prepared for physical activity, such as wrestling or sports. The surface finish is matte, and the figure is solidly built, likely made from a durable material.
description: A muscular adult male in athletic attire with armbands, shorts, and knee-high lace-up boots, standing in a neutral pose. The figure has a defined build and a short, close-cropped hairstyle.
description_view_0: Back view showing broad shoulders, muscular back, armbands, and the rear of the shorts and boots.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, arm, and the side lacing of the boot.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the chest, abs, facial features, and the front of the boots and shorts.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, arm, and the side lacing of the boot.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic trunks, armbands, and knee-high lace-up boots
